title: nothing-new-under-the-sun writes its digest to .excn/research/
description: The prior-art agent's definition forbids file writes (final message is the deliverable), so its digest evaporates unless a human persists it — Brooks hit this running it in another repo. Change the definition: the agent writes its digest to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md (overwriting its own prior run for the same PRD) and returns the path + summary as its final message. Keep all other prohibitions (no verdicts, no other file writes, sourced-only). Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First with root mirror.
acceptance_criteria: Invoked with a PRD, the agent leaves a sourced digest at .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md
It writes nothing else and still issues no verdicts
alignment PASS; Team Lead approved; root mirrors src/template
fix: prior-art agent writes its digest to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md; alignment PASS, Brooks approved.
